releaseNotes: Quality-of-life improvements: tap any bottle to assign Narcotic/Refrigerated/Bottle/Blister/Cream — the category is remembered for that drug and auto-applied on the next scan. The Edit Bottle dialog now also lets you move stock between zones without re-scanning. Linear (1D) barcodes that don't decode as standard formats are now captured as raw rows instead of being rejected — fill in the drug name on the dashboard. New "Check for updates" item in the dashboard overflow menu (the three-dot button) for when a fresh release lands and you don't want to wait for the next-day auto-check.
